summary: Clean, minimal fix that correctly removes stale entry price from flip order params, letting the provider use live market data. Strong revert-proof test coverage.

comments.body: Good defensive fallback: `result.averagePrice ?? position.entryPrice`. Consider logging when the fallback activates — if `averagePrice` is frequently missing from the provider response, it could indicate an upstream issue worth investigating.

TradingService.ts is at 2,042 lines (above 2,000-line suggestion threshold). This PR reduces it — just noting for future awareness. Consider splitting trading operations (open/close/flip/margin) into focused sub-services when the file next grows.
